description_long: This object consists of a tall, slender metallic pole with a smooth, circular base that provides stability. The pole is uniform in diameter and appears to be made of brushed or polished metal, giving it a sleek, modern appearance. There is no visible flag fabric, emblem, or banner attached to the pole, making it appear as a bare flagpole. The base is slightly domed and wider than the pole, ensuring the structure remains upright and secure on flat surfaces. The overall design is minimalistic, with no decorative elements or additional hardware visible. This type of flagpole is commonly found in urban environments such as parks, plazas, or outside public buildings.
description: A tall, metallic flagpole with a smooth, circular base and a minimalist, modern design. No flag or emblem is attached.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the slender metallic pole and the round, stable base.
description_view_1: Side view with the pole and base visible, highlighting the uniform diameter and smooth finish.
description_view_2: Another side view, nearly identical to view 1, with the same pole and base proportions.
description_view_3: Rear view, similar to the front, showing the pole's straightness and the base's symmetry.
attribute_flag_design: No flag or emblem is present; only a bare metallic pole with a circular base is visible.
